Title: Verify start of the process
Preconditions: No initial configuration has been performed
Test Steps:
1. Start the application
2. Check if the initial configuration check is performed
Expected Result: The application should not have been initialized, and the process should proceed to the distributor list access.

Title: Verify initialization of the application
Test Steps:
1. Start the application
2. Check if the initial configuration check is performed
Expected Result: The application should have been initialized, and the process should proceed to the distributor list access.

Title: Verify adding a vehicle manually
Preconditions: No initial configuration has been performed
Test Steps:
1. Start the application
2. Check if the initial configuration check is not performed
3. Choose to add a vehicle manually
4. Enter the vehicle data
5. Check if the vehicle is added to the list
Expected Result: The vehicle should be added to the list.

Title: Verify adding a vehicle from the dataset
Preconditions: No initial configuration has been performed
Test Steps:
1. Start the application
2. Check if the initial configuration check is not performed
3. Choose to select a vehicle from the dataset
4. Search for the vehicle in the dataset
5. Check if the vehicle is found in the dataset
6. Select the vehicle and add it to the list
7. Check if the vehicle is added to the list
Expected Result: The vehicle should be added to the list.

Title: Verify adding an invalid vehicle
Preconditions: No initial configuration has been performed
Test Steps:
1. Start the application
2. Check if the initial configuration check is not performed
3. Choose to add a vehicle manually
4. Enter the invalid vehicle data
5. Check if an error message is displayed
Expected Result: An error message should be displayed, and the vehicle should not be added to the list.

Title: Verify adding multiple vehicles
Preconditions: No initial configuration has been performed
Test Steps:
1. Start the application
2. Check if the initial configuration check is not performed
3. Choose to add a vehicle manually
4. Enter the first vehicle data
5. Check if the vehicle is added to the list
6. Choose to add another vehicle
7. Enter the second vehicle data
8. Check if the second vehicle is added to the list
9. Repeat steps 6-8 for additional vehicles
10. Check if all vehicles are added to the list
Expected Result: All vehicles should be added to the list.

Title: Verify accessing the distributor list
Test Steps:
1. Start the application
2. Check if the initial configuration check is performed
3. Proceed to the distributor list access
Expected Result: The distributor list should be displayed.

Title: Verify sorting the distributor list
Test Steps:
1. Start the application
2. Check if the initial configuration check is performed
3. Proceed to the distributor list access
4. Choose to modify the sorting parameters
5. Customize the sorting parameters
6. Check if the distributor list is updated according to the new parameters
Expected Result: The distributor list should be updated according to the new parameters.

Title: Verify selecting a distributor
Test Steps:
1. Start the application
2. Check if the initial configuration check is performed
3. Proceed to the distributor list access
4. Choose a valid distributor
5. Check if the navigation app is opened automatically
Expected Result: The navigation app should be opened automatically, and the user should be navigated to the selected distributor.

Title: Verify navigating to other pages
Test Steps:
1. Start the application
2. Check if the initial configuration check is performed
3. Proceed to the distributor list access
4. Choose to see other diagrams
Expected Result: The other diagrams should be displayed.

Title: Verify accessing the settings page
Test Steps:
1. Start the application
2. Check if the initial configuration check is performed
3. Proceed to the settings page
Expected Result: The settings page should be displayed.

Title: Verify modifying the vehicle list
Test Steps:

2. Check if the initial configuration check is performed
3. Proceed to the settings page
4. Choose to modify the vehicle list
5. Modify the vehicle list
6. Check if the modification is saved
Expected Result: The vehicle list should be modified, and the modification should be saved.

Title: Verify viewing the confirmation pop-up
Test Steps:

2. Check if the initial configuration check is performed
3. Proceed to the settings page
4. Choose to modify the vehicle list
5. Modify the vehicle list
6. Check if the confirmation pop-up is displayed
Expected Result: The confirmation pop-up should be displayed.

2. Check if the initial configuration check is performed

4. Choose to access the distributor list page
Expected Result: The distributor list page should be displayed.
